title: codex 额度手动重置成功后又被官方刷回初始状态了
content:
我的 Codex 额度用完了，然后在某鱼上买了一个邀请邮箱。 邀请成功之后，我的额度确实显示成功了，但隔了不到 5 分钟，我重新再看我的额度时候，又变回重置额度之前的状态。

我买的邀请邮箱是这样子的 ： xxxxxxx@pxxxxxl.com

不知道是官方的 BUG…
eventKey: codex-额度手动重置成功后又被官方刷回初始状态了
normalizedTitle: codex 额度手动重置成功后又被官方刷回初始状态了

title: 官方拟出新规：外卖平台不得通过长期、大额补贴，扰乱市场秩序；不得强制经营者参加补贴活动 | 原文
content: China's market regulator released draft rules to regulate food delivery platform subsidies on June 17. The rules prohibit platforms from using long-term, large-scale subsidies to disrupt market order and from forcing merchants to participate in subsidy campaigns. The move addresses problems including platforms competing through subsidies and price wars, which harm merchants, delivery workers, consumers, and the real economy while intensifying harmful industry competition.
eventKey: 官方拟出新规-外卖平台不得通过长期-大额补贴-扰乱市场秩序-不得强制经营者参加补贴活动

title: 🖼 马斯克SpaceX正式以600亿美金收购Cursor
content: SpaceX acquired Cursor in a $60 billion stock deal to jointly develop AI models. The companies have been collaborating for months and plan to release a co-trained model on Cursor and Grok Build platforms. Cursor's team will join SpaceX to advance AI technology alongside its existing aerospace operations.

title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
content: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp is a high-performance code intelligence MCP server that indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph. It processes average repositories in milliseconds, supports 158 languages, delivers sub-millisecond queries, and reduces token usage by 99%. The tool is distributed as a single static binary with zero dependencies. Written in C, the project has 4,104 stars and 420 forks.

title: AI改变的不是效率，而是饭碗
content: AI threatens white-collar jobs by replacing standardized, digitizable tasks—code generation, writing, design, video production, and data analysis. Rather than immediate mass layoffs, companies will first raise productivity standards, merge roles, and freeze hiring, gradually reducing headcount through attrition. Surviving workers must evolve into four types: augmentation specialists who multiply output with AI; network builders who orchestrate external resources; high-judgment decision-makers who assess quality and risk; and relationship-dependent roles requiring trust and presence. The future organizational model shifts from employment to modular coordination, with individuals becoming lightweight ecosystem nodes rather than fixed employees.
eventKey: ai改变的不是效率-而是饭碗
normalizedTitle: ai改变的不是效率 而是饭碗

title: The Fintech Playbook for Latin America

title: 2026 06 17 HackerNews
content: Fake LinkedIn job offers trick developers into running npm install, triggering backdoors via prepare scripts. Local LLMs like Gemma 4 now handle coding tasks well enough to justify building local ecosystems. John Carmack praises Fabrice Bellard for foundational tools like QEMU and FFmpeg. SpaceX acquires Cursor maker Anysphere for $60 billion in stock. An interactive 3D guide explains mechanical watch movements. A Tasmota smart bulb becomes a dead drop for banned books. U.S. export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 model were triggered by a simple "fix this code" prompt. Apple's Vehicle Motion Cues dots reduce car sickness. An x86 emulator team replaced 65,536 redundant write instructions with a loop. Meta's forced AI tool adoption damages engineering culture and causes outages.

normalizedTitle: 2026 06 17 hackernews

title: 腾讯出资 2000 万美元入股阿里前明星研究员林俊旸的 AI 实验室
content: Tencent invested $20 million in an AI lab founded by Lin Junyang, former chief researcher of Alibaba's Tongyi large language model. The lab's first funding round totaled several hundred million dollars at a post-investment valuation of approximately $2 billion, led by Gaorong Capital and Sequoia China each contributing $100 million. The team is already preparing its next funding round.

title: 山姆中国变更董事长
content: Walmart (China) Investment Co. changed its legal representative and chairman from MUK SOOK YE to Liu Peng. Founded in April 2003 with registered capital of about $330 million, the company sells medical devices, acts as domestic trade agent, and sells general merchandise. It is wholly owned by Walmart China Holdings.
